titleStmt.title: SII 26.242: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 242. (A.R. No. 230 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAMĀDĒVI, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places. It records a list of lands belonging to the god Kulaśēkhara-īśvaramuḍaiyār of Śōḻamādēvinallūr. It includes a land where 6 kalam of seeds could be sown, for food offering, a land, where I kalam of seed could be sown, for nimantappuṟam, a land where padakku of seed could be sown for a service (name lost), a land where 2 kalam of seed could be sown, for tirununtā-viḷakkuppuṟam, a land where 3 kalam of seed could be sown for food offerings to the deity and another land where[•••••]ṇippadakku of seed could be sown for the poṉvilai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: svastiśrī . coḻamātevinallūr Āḷuṭaiyār kulacekara Īvacuramuṭaiyāṟku Ivvūril Amutupaṭipuṟamāy puravi niṅku vitai Aṟukalamum Iṉṉāyaṉār Uvaccapuṟa vitai Aṟukalamum nimantappuṟam vitai kalamum puṟam vitai patakkum tirununtāviḷakkupuṟam vitai Irukalamum Ittevarkku kaṟkkum nāyanāṟkku Amutupaṭippuṟam vitai mukkalamum poṉvilait te �ṇippatakkum paṉmāyeśvara Irekṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.242 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
